raw_consumer_statement:
Hello, so i have purchased XXXX  from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX separate transactions amounts are {$22000.00}, {$22000.00}, {$18000.00} i will attach the letters from American Express, this purchase was for my business it was XXXX XXXX, i ordered the XXXX XXXX and i paid in advance i also have communication letter with the company that i made purchase from, when the time was to be delivered the company contacted me telling me that they have issues with there merchant and bank account and they are not able to refund the money or send me the XXXX XXXX and they recommended me to call my credit card issuer and dispute the transactions, so i had no choice but to dispute it, so i called American Express and explained them what happen and they opened the dispute claim and i already paid off the balance i had with them so they issued me a temporarily credit and after investigation they denied my claim saying that based our review, we believe no goods and/or services were purchased or exchanged in this transaction Hence, we are closing the dispute case. And they have also closed my American Express Business Credit Card. 

I will attach the bank letter and also communication letter.
